description: Coverage domain reference model for log source mapping. Each domain defines required tables (minimum viable visibility) and enhanced tables (deeper telemetry).

identity.label: Identity & Access
identity.description: Authentication, authorisation, directory changes, MFA, risk events
identity.gap_impact: No visibility into user authentication, sign-in anomalies, or directory changes. Cannot investigate account compromise, impossible travel, or brute-force attacks.

endpoint.label: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Process execution, file activity, network connections, registry, device logon
endpoint.gap_impact: No visibility into process execution, file writes, or network connections on endpoints. Cannot investigate malware, LOLBin abuse, or lateral movement.

email.label: Email Security
email.description: Email delivery, URLs in email, attachments, post-delivery actions
email.gap_impact: No visibility into email delivery or phishing campaigns. Cannot trace malicious URLs/attachments from email to endpoint.

cloud_apps.label: Cloud & SaaS
cloud_apps.description: M365 activity, cloud app events, Graph API, shadow IT
cloud_apps.gap_impact: No visibility into cloud application usage or M365 activity. Cannot detect data exfiltration via SaaS, shadow IT, or suspicious app behaviour.

network.label: Network
network.description: Firewall, proxy, CEF syslog, network traffic
network.gap_impact: No firewall or proxy logs. Cannot detect C2 beaconing, network-based data exfiltration, or anomalous outbound connections.

alerts.label: Alerts & Incidents
alerts.description: Security alerts, incidents, threat intel indicators
alerts.gap_impact: No centralised alert or incident data. Cannot correlate alerts across detection sources or match against threat intelligence.

azure_infra.label: Azure Infrastructure
azure_infra.description: Azure control plane activity, DevOps auditing
azure_infra.gap_impact: No visibility into Azure resource changes or DevOps pipeline activity. Cannot detect unauthorised infrastructure modifications.

device_mgmt.label: Device Management
device_mgmt.description: Intune compliance, device inventory, audit logs
device_mgmt.gap_impact: No visibility into device compliance or Intune management actions. Limited ability to assess device posture during investigations.
